products.name: TristanGovGraph Québec
products.mission: Map public-sector entities, sources, evidence and risks into an OAK-safe graph.
products.next_milestone: Add open-data ingestion and JSON export
products.notes: Demo must remain analysis-only until source policy is reviewed.

products.name: Municipalité-OAK
products.mission: Generate municipal service and data-quality reports from authorized public information.
products.next_milestone: Create municipal input template and generated report
products.notes: Signals cannot be represented as final performance judgments.

products.name: Privacy-OAK Public Bodies
products.mission: Help public bodies document data flows, minimization and review requirements.
products.next_milestone: Define privacy-specific schemas and blocked-use cases
products.notes: Requires strict review before any pilot.
